name: Carboxylic acid -> ethyl ester (esterase-labile PK-masking handle)
description: Esterifies a free carboxylic acid to its ethyl ester (the encoded transformation for the ester-prodrug PK-masking strategy). Fires only on compounds that have a free -COOH; on a compound with no carboxyl it produces nothing and the engine reports the strategy's attachment point as absent.
